hooks.name: validate-owl-after-edit
hooks.description: Run basic OWL syntax validation after editing ontology files
hooks.command: cd src/ontology && robot validate --input "{{file_path}}" --output /dev/null 2>&1 || echo 'Warning: OWL validation found issues. Run /validate for details.'

hooks.name: check-owl-syntax-after-write
hooks.description: Validate OWL syntax when writing new ontology files
hooks.command: cd src/ontology && robot validate --input "{{file_path}}" --output /dev/null 2>&1 || echo 'Warning: OWL file may have syntax issues.'

hooks.name: remind-to-test
hooks.description: Remind to run tests after significant ontology edits
hooks.command:
echo '
💡 Tip: Consider running /validate or /quick-test to check your changes.'

hooks.name: check-id-format
hooks.description: Check for proper ID format in ontology edits
hooks.command: if grep -q 'rdf:about="[^#]*#[^_]*_[0-9]\+"' "{{file_path}}"; then echo '✓ IDs appear well-formed'; else echo '⚠ Check ID formats (should be PREFIX_#######)'; fi

hooks.name: backup-before-imports-refresh
hooks.command: cd src/ontology && cp -r imports imports.backup.$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S) && echo '✓ Backup created in imports.backup.*'

hooks.name: check-git-status
hooks.description: Check git status before major operations
